command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute UPDATE products
SET importedBrandName = 'Apple',
    importedCategoryName = '智慧型手機',
    categoryId = 15
WHERE batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
  AND categoryId IS NULL;

UPDATE station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
SET se.categoryId = 15,
    se.subtypeCode = 'Apple',
    se.countForProductivity = 1
WHERE p.batchNo IN ('00500025209','00500025225','00500025228','00500025229','00500025239','00500025240','00500025241','00500025247','00500025252','00500025253','00500025256','00500025264','00500025266','00500025269','00500025271')
  AND se.stationCode = 'A1'
  AND se.stationEventType = 'complete';
